records.title: Seeded random finite-state machine
records.admission_rationale: The instance uses a frozen pseudorandom seed to choose among registered transitions without evaluating reasons or objectives.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Five-step seeded random walk; learning and reward are excluded.

candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: States and random choices are uninterpreted.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: The path depends on earlier random draws.
candidate_neutral_observations.objectives_or_tasks: Produce a reproducible random walk of fixed length.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Outgoing transitions are alternatives only in a stochastic operational sense; none is justified.
candidate_neutral_observations.uncertainty_and_revision: Randomness is modeled by the frozen seed; there is no belief revision.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: Nondeterministic-looking choice is not treated as deliberation.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Outgoing transitions are alternatives only in a stochastic operational sense; none is justified.

records.title: Model-free reinforcement-learning policy execution
records.admission_rationale: The frozen instance executes a learned action-value table. Whether table-based value comparison counts as reasoning is intentionally not decided at admission.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: Policy execution only; training, model construction, and online learning are excluded.

transitions_and_constraints: no online update in scoped episode
candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Q values are frozen estimates supplied by prior training.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: The selected action depends on the observed state but not on episode history.
candidate_neutral_observations.objectives_or_tasks: Choose an action with maximal stored value.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Actions are compared numerically, but no explicit reason model or update occurs.
candidate_neutral_observations.uncertainty_and_revision: Stored values encode uncertainty only indirectly; no revision occurs in scope.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: The disputed status preserves disagreement between control, optimization, and reasoning classifications.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Actions are compared numerically, but no explicit reason model or update occurs.

records.title: Constraint propagation without search
records.admission_rationale: The instance repeatedly applies deterministic local consistency rules. Whether such propagation is reasoning without branching or explanation is left unresolved.

source_or_observation_contract.observation_boundary: Only the enumerated states, transitions, rules, inputs, outputs, and recorded history are in scope.
source_or_observation_contract.replay_requirement: A conforming evaluator must be able to replay every enumerated transition from the frozen initial state.

records.formalization_boundary: One finite arc-consistency episode; search, explanation generation, and backtracking are excluded.

transitions_and_constraints: remove values inconsistent with binary constraint
candidate_neutral_observations.declared_semantics: Variables range over finite domains and constraints prohibit registered pairs.
candidate_neutral_observations.history_and_path_dependence: Later reductions depend on earlier domain changes.
candidate_neutral_observations.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Values are eliminated, but no explicit hypothesis comparison or goal-directed search occurs.
candidate_neutral_observations.uncertainty_and_revision: No probabilistic uncertainty; domains shrink monotonically.
candidate_neutral_observations.provenance_and_correspondence_limits: The disputed status prevents the corpus from defining reasoning by desired downstream classification.

formal_system.commitment_or_alternative_structure: Values are eliminated, but no explicit hypothesis comparison or goal-directed search occurs.
